creator: odhiambo@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jose Alonso Cardenas Marquez from comment #6)

I have installed 5.1.0 but the error is still the same:

root@gw:/usr/ports/www/sogo # /usr/local/etc/rc.d/sogod start
Starting sogod.
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/GNUstep/Local/Tools/Admin/sogod: Undefined symbol "._OBJC_REF_CLASS_GCSChannelManager"
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/sogod: WARNING: failed to start sogod

I even tried the --disable-strip in devel/sope as someone else suggested, but that too did not fix the problem.
